	This item is imbued with a certain number of *Spell Charges* depending on its rarity (1 for Common, 2 for Uncommon, 3 for Rare, and 4 for Legendary). As a Use Item action, you may cast and heighten the spells from the list below by expending a number of Spell Charges equal to the Circle of spell cast. You may use your INT, WIS, or CHA as your spellcasting modifier when casting these spells:

* 1st Circle: **Astral Darts**

When you complete a long rest, all expended Spell Charges imbued into the item are restored.

Name: Charcoal Whistle
Flavor: Brittle remains held in form by vivid memories of flame. In song, you revive that vigor.
Description:
As a Use Item action, you may cause a target within your Reach to be set ablaze.

	This item is imbued with a certain number of *Spell Charges* depending on its rarity (1 for Common, 2 for Uncommon, 3 for Rare, and 4 for Legendary). As a Use Item action, you may cast and heighten the spells from the list below by expending a number of Spell Charges equal to the Circle of spell cast. You may use your INT, WIS, or CHA as your spellcasting modifier when casting these spells:

* 1st Circle: **Erupting Flame**

* 2nd Circle: **Fireball**

When you complete a long rest, all expended Spell Charges imbued into the item are restored.

Name: Loaded Die
Flavor: An anomalous six-sided die wrought from forces of improbability. The nature of luck itself seems to bend about its presence.
Description:
When your character rolls the **Loaded Die**, they may decide the outcome beforehand. Additionally, you may cast **Tricksleeve** using your INT, WIS, or CHA as your spellcasting modifier.

	This item is imbued with a certain number of *Spell Charges* depending on its rarity (1 for Common, 2 for Uncommon, 3 for Rare, and 4 for Legendary). As a Use Item action, you may cast and heighten the spells from the list below by expending a number of Spell Charges equal to the Circle of spell cast. You may use your INT, WIS, or CHA as your spellcasting modifier when casting these spells:

* 1st Circle: **Bend Luck**

* 2nd Circle: **Resistance**

When you complete a long rest, all expended Spell Charges imbued into the item are restored.

Name: Mist Seer's Journal
Flavor: Countless expeditions and routes cover each page of the tome. What remains to be answered is where such a place could be found.
Description:
You may cast **Spectral Lantern** using your INT, WIS, or CHA as your spellcasting modifier.

This item is imbued with a certain number of *Spell Charges* depending on its rarity (1 for Common, 2 for Uncommon, 3 for Rare, and 4 for Legendary). As a Use Item action, you may cast and heighten the spells from the list below by expending a number of Spell Charges equal to the Circle of spell cast. You may use your INT, WIS, or CHA as your spellcasting modifier when casting these spells:

* 1st Circle: **Fog Cloud**

* 2nd Circle: **Lucidity**

When you complete a long rest, all expended Spell Charges imbued into the item are restored.

Name: Clockwork Orb
Flavor: A glossy sphere acting as a window into an endless matrix of spinning cogs and wheels, slowly calculating a solution encoded in its concordant motions.
Description:
When you make an Analyze check, you may choose to gain advantage on the check. If you do, you do not learn any information from the Analyze check until the start of your next turn.

This item is imbued with a certain number of *Spell Charges* depending on its rarity (1 for Common, 2 for Uncommon, 3 for Rare, and 4 for Legendary). As a Use Item action, you may cast and heighten the spells from the list below by expending a number of Spell Charges equal to the Circle of spell cast. You may use your INT, WIS, or CHA as your spellcasting modifier when casting these spells:

* 1st Circle: **Animate Interceptor**

* 2nd Circle: **Accelerate**

* 3rd Circle: **Crystalline Sentinel**

When you complete a long rest, all expended Spell Charges imbued into the item are restored.

Name: Faeglass Shard
Flavor: Fragments of a broken mirror whisper with the remorseful wails of those trapped behind it.
Description:
Once per rest, as a Use Item action, you may cause a target creature within 30 feet of you to make a **Courage** saving throw against either DC 20 or your Spell DC for any of your Spellcasting or Battlecasting features, whichever is highest. On a failure, you may choose to either learn the target's greatest personal regret or their smallest combat check bonus (you learn multiple if there is a tie).

This item is imbued with a certain number of *Spell Charges* depending on its rarity (1 for Common, 2 for Uncommon, 3 for Rare, and 4 for Legendary). As a Use Item action, you may cast and heighten the spells from the list below by expending a number of Spell Charges equal to the Circle of spell cast. You may use your INT, WIS, or CHA as your spellcasting modifier when casting these spells:

* 1st Circle: **Sanguine Sliver**

* 2nd Circle: **Shatter**

* 3rd Circle: **Imprisonment**

When you complete a long rest, all expended Spell Charges imbued into the item are restored.

Name: Sand Bag
Flavor: Sleep with one eye open...
Description:
This bag is enchanted to produce seemingly endless, magical sand. As a Use Item action, you may cover a target within your Reach with this sand. While covered in this manner, the target is under the effects of **Phosphorescence**. An action may be used to clean the sand off of the target and end the effect.

This item is imbued with a certain number of *Spell Charges* depending on its rarity (1 for Common, 2 for Uncommon, 3 for Rare, and 4 for Legendary). As a Use Item action, you may cast and heighten the spells from the list below by expending a number of Spell Charges equal to the Circle of spell cast. You may use your INT, WIS, or CHA as your spellcasting modifier when casting these spells:

* 1st Circle: **Drowsiness**

* 2nd Circle: **Sleep**

* 3rd Circle: **Enthralling Performance**

When you complete a long rest, all expended Spell Charges imbued into the item are restored.

Name: Fenwretch Manuscript
Flavor: Held dearest by the most spiteful of cultivators. Endless hexes line the wilted margins.
Description:
While equipped, you gain the following benefits:

* You may cast **Antivenom** using your INT, WIS, or CHA as your spellcasting modifier.

* As an action, you may either become poisoned or cleanse yourself of being poisoned.

* While you are poisoned or have that condition suppressed, you gain DB 20 against **biological damage** and once per turn, when you deal **poison damage** with a spell effect, you may add 10 to the damage roll.

This item is imbued with a certain number of *Spell Charges* depending on its rarity (1 for Common, 2 for Uncommon, 3 for Rare, and 4 for Legendary). As a Use Item action, you may cast and heighten the spells from the list below by expending a number of Spell Charges equal to the Circle of spell cast. You may use your INT, WIS, or CHA as your spellcasting modifier when casting these spells:

* 1st Circle: **Poison Needles**

* 2nd Circle: **Toxic Fume**

* 3rd Circle: **Polymorph**

* 4th Circle: **Miasma**

When you complete a long rest, all expended Spell Charges imbued into the item are restored.

Name: Gildroot Braid
Flavor: Glittering roots from the foundations of the world gnarled into a ring. Flecks of immaterial gold drift away from the wooden spirals as your spells pass through the center.
Description:
You may cast **Bristle Lash** using your INT, WIS, or CHA as your spellcasting modifier. When you do, you may cause the spell attack to automatically hit and convert all damage dealt to instead be **regained as ST**.

This item is imbued with a certain number of *Spell Charges* depending on its rarity (1 for Common, 2 for Uncommon, 3 for Rare, and 4 for Legendary). As a Use Item action, you may cast and heighten the spells from the list below by expending a number of Spell Charges equal to the Circle of spell cast. You may use your INT, WIS, or CHA as your spellcasting modifier when casting these spells:

* 1st Circle: **Earthen Wall**

* 2nd Circle: **Circle of Renewal**

* 3rd Circle: **Radiant Arsenal**

* 4th Circle: **Violent Bloom**

When you complete a long rest, all expended Spell Charges imbued into the item are restored.

Name: Lightning Rod
Flavor: The first mage to use this item found the results quite...shocking.
Description:
While equipped, you gain the following benefits:

* You may cast **Static Shock** using your INT, WIS, or CHA as your spellcasting modifier.

* If a target creature within 15 feet of you takes **lightning damage**, you may take a reaction to redirect the damage to you and this item's aspect regains a Spell Charge for every 15 damage taken this way.

This item is imbued with a certain number of *Spell Charges* depending on its rarity (1 for Common, 2 for Uncommon, 3 for Rare, and 4 for Legendary). As a Use Item action, you may cast and heighten the spells from the list below by expending a number of Spell Charges equal to the Circle of spell cast. You may use your INT, WIS, or CHA as your spellcasting modifier when casting these spells:

* 1st Circle: **Lightning Bolt**

* 2nd Circle: **Electric Tomb**

* 3rd Circle: **Squall**

* 4th Circle: **Warp Cage**

When you complete a long rest, all expended Spell Charges imbued into the item are restored.

Name: Custom Focus
Flavor: There is nothing before a beginning and everything follows from there.
Description:
You upgrade the rarity of a Mundane spellcasting focus to Common, choose a 1st Circle spell, and grant it the following aspect (the item is now able to accept aspects). The chosen spell has one of the following limitations:

* **If you craft this upgrade**, the spell must be from one of the spell lists chosen for your Scrivener specialization.

* **If you purchase this upgrade**, the GM determines the available spell list(s) from which you are able to choose.

	This item is imbued with a certain number of *Spell Charges* depending on its rarity (1 for Common, 2 for Uncommon, 3 for Rare, and 4 for Legendary). As a Use Item action, this item can cast and heighten the spells from the list below by expending a number of Spell Charges equal to the Circle of spell cast. You may use your INT, WIS, or CHA as your spellcasting modifier when casting these spells:

* 1st Circle: (The spell chosen as part of **Custom Focus**)

Name: Focus Infusion (Uncommon)
Flavor: Rough drafts are what they are.
Description:
The item's rarity is upgraded to Uncommon. If the item has an **Imbued Spells** aspect, you may add a 2nd Circle spell of your choosing to its list of spells. The chosen spell has one of the following limitations:

* **If you craft this upgrade**, the spell must be from one of the spell lists chosen for your Scrivener specialization.

* **If you purchase this upgrade**, the GM determines the available spell list(s) from which you are able to choose.

Name: Focus Infusion (Rare)
Flavor: From a wider perspective, you can see how it could all be better composed.
Description:
The item's rarity is upgraded to Rare. If the item has an **Imbued Spells** aspect, you may add a 3rd Circle spell of your choosing to its list of spells. The chosen spell has one of the following limitations:

* **If you craft this upgrade**, the spell must be from one of the spell lists chosen for your Scrivener specialization.

* **If you purchase this upgrade**, the GM determines the available spell list(s) from which you are able to choose.

Name: Focus Infusion (Legendary)
Flavor: Perfected down to the letter, diacritics and all.
Description:
The item's rarity is upgraded to Legendary. If the item has an **Imbued Spells** aspect, you may add a 4th Circle spell of your choosing to its list of spells. The chosen spell has one of the following limitations:

* **If you craft this upgrade**, the spell must be from one of the spell lists chosen for your Scrivener specialization.

* **If you purchase this upgrade**, the GM determines the available spell list(s) from which you are able to choose.
